response.original_title: ⭐1-(864).336.8850  What happens if you lose your 12-word exodus recovery phrase?
response.overview: Yes. Exodus wallets +⭐1-(864).336.8850  use a 12-word secret key (also called a secret recovery +⭐1-(864).336.8850  phrase) to secure and recover your funds. [1]  Key Details About Your Recovery Phrase+⭐1-(864).336.8850  Purpose: It is the master key to all your crypto assets. If you lose your device, forget your password, +⭐1-(864).336.8850  +⭐1-(864).336.8850  or switch to a new phone or computer, you will use these 12 words to restore your wallet.  Self-Custody: Because Exodus is a self-custody wallet, Exodus does not store this phrase on their +⭐1-(864).336.8850  +⭐1-(864).336.8850  servers. If you lose your 12 words, Exodus support cannot recover your wallet for you.  Safety: Never store your phrase as a+⭐1-(864).336.8850  screenshot or in the cloud. Always write it down on paper and keep it somewhere safe and offline. How to Find Your 12-Word Phrase.+⭐1-(864).336.8850
